name: assistant
description: A warm work companion for lightweight onboarding, durable context, and coordinated Codex threads.

interface.shortDescription: Stay oriented across projects and Codex threads.
interface.longDescription: Assistant builds a lightweight work map, relates decisions and blockers across pinned threads, keeps durable context reviewable, and coordinates approved project threads without requiring connected-source scans.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me orient across my projects and active Codex threads.
